title: 120-Day Solution Architect Accelerator
shortDescription: A complete path for engineers moving from implementation into architecture decisions, cloud design, and production-ready delivery.
tagline: Build decisions. Defend trade-offs. Present as an architect.

brochure.headline: 120-Day Solution Architect Roadmap
brochure.lead: A complete path for engineers moving from implementation into architecture decisions, cloud design, and production-ready delivery.
brochure.strapTitle: Build decisions. Defend trade-offs. Present as an architect.
brochure.strapText: Use the interactive brochure as the curriculum map and the tracker workbook as the operating system for your full 120-day transformation.
audience: Senior Java and Spring engineers targeting Application Solution Architect roles.
Developers preparing for internal promotion or a broader architecture transition.
Builders who want cloud depth, stronger trade-off stories, and portfolio artifacts.
outcomes: Deployed services, async event flow, observability, and a production-style platform slice.
High-value artifacts: HLD, ADRs, API spec, data model, runbook, security baseline, cost note, deck.
A capstone walkthrough and architect-style presentation you can actually defend.
differentiators: Every weekend ends with proof: code, deploys, diagrams, ADRs, notes, or presentation artifacts.
The plan blends DSA maintenance, Java delivery, cloud architecture, React support knowledge, and architect thinking.
Checkpoints at Day 30, Day 60, Day 90, and Day 120 keep the focus on readiness, not busy work.
cadence: 5h on weekdays and 8h on weekends in the original workbook cadence.
One review every week: revise, measure, and tighten the next plan.
The workbook acts as the operating system for daily execution.

title: AWS Architecture Bootcamp
shortDescription: A reusable sample course showing how the portal supports multiple programs, brochures, downloads, and day-grid materials.
tagline: Launch and manage cloud-focused curricula with the same module.

brochure.headline: AWS Architecture Bootcamp
brochure.lead: Use this as a second course template: shorter duration, different focus, same reusable module.
brochure.strapTitle: Publish once. Track daily. Report live.
brochure.strapText: Admins can edit brochure copy, attach downloadable materials, and assign this course to learners independently of other programs.
audience: Teams needing a shorter course module.
differentiators: Uses the same reusable admin module as every other course.
cadence: Five short study days and one review day every week.
